title: Resetting your password
content: If you forgot your password, you can reset it by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. An email with a reset link will be sent to your registered email address.

title: How to request a refund
content: If you are unhappy with your purchase, or have been charged incorrectly, please reach out to our billing specialists. We process all refunds within 3-5 business days. Please mention 'refund request' in the subject line.

title: Error Code 501: Shared memory allocation failed
content: Error Code 501 happens when the OS shared memory limit is too low for the database. Resolution: Increase the shmmax kernel parameter in /etc/sysctl.conf and reboot the server.

title: Hardware replacement policy
content: If your company-issued laptop or peripheral is malfunctioning, you may request a replacement piece. Hardware replacements require approval from your manager and the IT department.

title: Unable to connect to VPN
content: VPN connectivity issues are often caused by expired SSL certificates or incorrect routing tables. Please verify that your certificate is up-to-date and try to restart your VPN client.

title: Feature requests and product feedback
content: If you have an idea for a new feature or want to provide feedback on our current product line, please submit a feature request. Our Product Assessment team reviews these monthly.

title: Upgrading your subscription plan
content: You can upgrade from Basic to Pro or Enterprise directly from your dashboard. Navigate to Settings > Billing and select 'Change Plan'. The pro-rated difference will be charged immediately.

title: Setting up 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication)
content: For enhanced security, we strongly recommend enabling 2FA. You can do this in your Account Settings. We support Google Authenticator, Authy, and SMS-based 2FA.

title: Database connection pooling limits
content: If you are seeing 'Too many connections' errors, you have hit your database connection pool limit. You can increase this limit in your database configuration panel under the 'Pool Size' setting.

title: Reporting a bug or outage
content: If the service is completely down or you are encountering application-breaking bugs, please file an urgent ticket. Our product and engineering teams will be notified immediately.

title: Profile and Avatar Customization
content: To change your profile picture, navigate to 'Settings' > 'Account' > 'Edit Profile'. Click on your current avatar to upload a new image. Supported formats are JPG, PNG, and GIF up to 5MB.
